summary: Phase 3 bulk operations (review_request) tested end-to-end. Backend: 15/15 pytest tests passed in /app/backend/tests/test_bulk_operations.py covering POST /api/tickets/bulk-assign and POST /api/tickets/bulk-status — koord-only (operator→403), empty array→422, invalid status→422, invalid assignee→404, successful bulk assign (3 tickets) with persistence verified via GET, bulk unassign (assignee_id=null), bulk status change with skip-already-target behaviour (updated=0), closed_at set on Selesai/Disetujui/Ditolak, audit_log entries 'bulk_assign' and 'bulk_status' present, per-ticket activity log entries 'assign'/'status_change' with meta.bulk=true. Frontend (Playwright on https://dapodik-approval.preview.emergentagent.com): KOORD /tickets renders select-all-checkbox + 19 row-checkbox-{ticket_number}; selecting 2 rows reveals bulk-action-bar with count='2', bulk-clear-selection, bulk-assign-button, bulk-status-button. Bulk Assign dialog: bulk-assignee-select shows '— Tidak ditugaskan —' + 'Koordinator Tim'; confirm-bulk-assign called POST /api/tickets/bulk-assign, toast '2 tiket diperbarui' shown, dialog closed, selection cleared, list reloaded, rows show 'Petugas: Koordinator Tim'. Bulk Status dialog: bulk-status-select contains all 8 statuses (Draft, Diajukan, Diproses, Menunggu Dokumen, Revisi, Disetujui, Selesai, Ditolak), bulk-status-catatan textarea works; confirm-bulk-status fires window.confirm (auto-accepted), toast shown, selection cleared. Filter change auto-clears selection (bar disappears from 1→0). /audit page renders 'Bulk Assign' and 'Bulk Status' labels. OPERATOR (operator1) /tickets correctly renders 0 select-all + 0 row-checkbox + 0 bulk-action-bar. All review_request bullets verified passing.

issues: Console warning: Radix DialogContent missing 'Description' or 'aria-describedby'. A11y minor — add <DialogDescription> in BulkAssignDialog and BulkStatusDialog.

action_items: (Optional A11y) Add <DialogDescription> to BulkAssignDialog and BulkStatusDialog to silence Radix console warnings.

(Optional cleanup) Several TEST_BULK_* tickets created across iterations remain in the DB (now 19 tickets total). Consider providing an admin cleanup endpoint or a DB script to purge TEST_-prefixed data.
(Carry-over) server.py is ~1400 lines — consider splitting into routers (auth/master/tickets/kb/audit/executive).
critical_code_review_comments: Bulk endpoints correctly use Pydantic Field(min_length=1) → empty array returns 422 as expected.
Path collision avoided: /tickets/bulk-assign (hyphen) NOT /tickets/bulk/assign — confirmed no overlap with /tickets/{tid}/assign.
bulk_assign: invalid assignee returns 404 BEFORE looping → no partial updates, good.
bulk_status: already-target tickets skipped (updated reflects only changed). closed_at set on Selesai/Disetujui/Ditolak. Good.
Both endpoints emit single audit_log entry per call (action='bulk_assign'/'bulk_status') with count + ticket_ids[:50] in meta — bounded metadata, good.
Per-ticket activity log entries written with meta.bulk=true — UI can distinguish bulk vs single operations.
Notifications: bulk_assign notifies assignee when != actor; bulk_status notifies ticket operator. Consistent with single-ticket counterparts.
Frontend selection clears via useEffect on filter dependency change — verified empirically (bar disappears on search change).
Operator role guard in UI: select-all/row-checkboxes/bulk-action-bar all hidden when user.role !== 'koordinator'. Verified.
AuditLog dropdown lists 'Bulk Assign' and 'Bulk Status' — confirmed.
test_credentials: koordinator@dapodik.id / koordinator123 + operator1@dapodik.id / operator123 — all working.
seed_data_creation: Tests created 3 TEST_BULK_* tickets via operator1; left in DB (assignee finally cleared, status=Selesai or Revisi after sequential test runs). Total tickets in DB now ~19.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 bulk ops fully functional. Selectors confirmed live: select-all-checkbox, row-checkbox-{ticket_number}, bulk-action-bar, bulk-selected-count, bulk-clear-selection, bulk-assign-button, bulk-status-button, bulk-assignee-select, confirm-bulk-assign, bulk-status-select, bulk-status-catatan, confirm-bulk-status. Backend endpoints: POST /api/tickets/bulk-assign and /api/tickets/bulk-status. window.confirm intercepts MUST be registered via page.on('dialog', d => d.accept()) BEFORE clicking confirm-bulk-status. Audit log dropdown labels: 'Bulk Assign', 'Bulk Status' (text content). Phase 1 + Phase 2 baseline (49 tests) still relevant.
